creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

We don't support compiling world with -O2.  I suspect the problem may 
be elsewhere, since I would expect Perl to be compilable with -O2. 
Regardless, make world does indeed work since since May 17, 1999, 
we have progressed from 3.1-stable to 3.4-stable.
